message:
feat(fp-columnar): add first/last/count_matching/zip_with/iter_enumerate (frankenpandas-k9g9)

Five more Column helpers rounding out the introspection and
composition surface:

- first() / last() — endpoint accessors returning `Option<&Scalar>`;
  empty columns yield None.
- count_matching(predicate) — returns the count of non-missing
  values that satisfy `predicate`. Missing inputs never count
  (consistent with apply_bool's missing→false contract).
- zip_with(other, func) — raw elementwise combine with an
  elementwise user function. Always invokes `func` so callers
  decide whether to short-circuit nulls; length mismatch returns
  LengthMismatch. Complementary to the existing `combine`, which
  imposes pandas' fill_value null policy.
- iter_enumerate() — shortcut for `iter_values().enumerate()`.

Co-lands frankenpandas-1sg3 (count_matching), kglb (zip_with),
wtsq (iter_enumerate).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
